summary: Completed testing of EuroMillions Sleeper Engine and new DJ Patterns (Reverse Twin, Day*Month-10). All 19 backend tests pass. Frontend Sleeper Radar panel works correctly - appears only in EuroMillions mode, shows Tease-Hot Numbers, Star Sleepers, and 10-Draw Forecast sections.
passed_tests: TestSleeperForecastEndpoint::test_sleeper_forecast_response_structure - All required keys present (last_draw, total_draws_analyzed, sleeper_report, star_sleepers, forecast, engine_stats)
TestSleeperForecastEndpoint::test_sleeper_report_structure - Sleeper report has proper structure with num, gap, overdue, circle_partner, circle_boost, tease_score, composite_score
TestSleeperForecastEndpoint::test_forecast_structure - Forecast has D+1 to D+10 predictions with 5 numbers and 2 stars each
TestMoneyModeEndpoint::test_money_mode_response_structure - Returns mode='💰 MONEY MODE' with tickets array
TestMoneyModeEndpoint::test_money_mode_ticket_structure - Each ticket has 5 numbers (1-50), 2 stars (1-12), patterns_used
TestMoneyModeEndpoint::test_money_mode_patterns_include_new_patterns - DJ patterns are used in money mode

passed: Sleeper Radar panel NOT present in Swiss Lotto mode (correct behavior)
Sleeper Radar panel appears in EuroMillions mode
Sleeper Radar toggle expands the panel
Tease-Hot Numbers section displays with sleeper data
Found 6 sleeper number elements with data-testid
Sleeper Radar panel correctly removed when switching back to Swiss mode

critical_code_review_comments: pattern_reverse_twin() in dj_patterns.py (line 2429) correctly reverses digits and handles mod 50 for values > 50
pattern_day_times_month_minus_10() in dj_patterns.py (line 2467) implements the esoteric formula Day*Month-10 with circle derivatives
sleeper_engine.py has well-structured SleeperInfo class with composite_score calculation based on proven simulation data
Sleeper Radar panel in App.js (line 2011) correctly uses data-testid attributes for testing
Conditional rendering {lotteryMode === 'euro' && ...} ensures Sleeper Radar only shows in EuroMillions mode
EuroMillions data has 1616 draws available for analysis
test_credentials: None required - all endpoints publicly accessible
seed_data_creation: N/A - using existing EuroMillions data (1616 draws from static Python files)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The EuroMillions Sleeper Engine is fully functional. Key endpoints: /api/euromillions/sleeper-forecast returns sleeper analysis with tease detection, circle boost, and 10-draw forecast. /api/euromillions/money-mode generates tickets using DJ patterns including Reverse Twin and Day*Month-10. Frontend Sleeper Radar panel (data-testid='sleeper-radar-panel') only appears in EuroMillions mode and shows Tease-Hot Numbers, Star Sleepers, and Forecast sections. All new DJ patterns (pattern_reverse_twin, pattern_day_times_month_minus_10) are integrated and working.

sleeper_forecast_api.returns: last_draw, total_draws_analyzed, sleeper_report (15 numbers), star_sleepers (6 stars), forecast (10 draws), engine_stats

money_mode_api.returns: tickets with numbers, stars, patterns_used including DJ patterns
